content:
✨ promptfoo | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Evaluating and red-teaming LLM applications to ensure their security, reliability, and performance.
✨ Key Features: • Automated evaluations of prompts and models • Red teaming and vulnerability scanning for LLM apps • Side-by-side model comparison (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure, Bedrock, Ollama, etc.) • CI/CD integration for automated checks
📖 Summary: Promptfoo is a command-line interface and library designed for testing, evaluating, and red-teaming Large Language Model (LLM) applications. It enables developers to compare the performance of different models, automate checks in CI/CD pipelines, and scan for vulnerabilities to ensure secure and reliable AI app deployment.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
